label: Ritual outcome comp (pawn expectations)
description: Applies a quality offset based on the expectation level of the pawn in the specified role. Each ExpectationDef maps to a quality offset via offsetPerExpectation.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display label shown in the ritual quality breakdown UI.

labelAbstract.label: Label (abstract)
labelAbstract.description: Alternative label used when no live ritual is available.

qualityOffset.label: Quality offset
qualityOffset.description: Not used directly; quality is looked up from offsetPerExpectation for the role pawn.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: Optional SimpleCurve; not typically used by this variant.

roleId.label: Role ID
roleId.description: Ritual role ID string identifying which pawn's expectation level to evaluate.

offsetForSlave.label: Offset for slave
offsetForSlave.description: Quality offset applied when the role pawn is a colony slave (bypasses the offsetPerExpectation lookup).

offsetPerExpectation.label: Offset per expectation
offsetPerExpectation.description: Keyed list mapping ExpectationDef defNames to quality offsets. Element name is the ExpectationDef defName; scalar text is the float offset.
